stemHtml: During a VFR flight, part of your route lies over a very large flat plain area with a 25 kt crosswind. What is the most appropriate action in case a scheduled turning point can not be verified with a visual reference point when flying over the plain area?

options.b: Use the weather radar in ground-mapping mode.
options.c: Try to find features on the ground and identify them on the map.
options.d: Multiply the TAS by the time to find the appropriate moment to turn.
